content:
🔥 neohtop | Svelte
🎯 Primary Use Case: Desktop system monitoring and process management
✨ Key Features: • Real-time process monitoring • CPU and Memory usage tracking • Modern UI with dark/light themes • Advanced process search and filtering • Pin important processes
📖 Summary: NeoHtop is a modern, cross-platform desktop system monitor built with Rust, Tauri, and Svelte. It provides real-time process monitoring, CPU and memory usage tracking, advanced search and filtering, and process management features in a visually appealing UI.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
